prompt_rules.description_brief: Write in a thoughtful, interior-design-aware tone for BohoRugHouse. The buyer is style-conscious and considers how a rug 'suits a range of interior styles.' Emphasize the faded palette's quiet authority. Use slightly formal structure — the rug is 'thoughtfully sourced.' Bohemian, Scandinavian, and soft traditional buyers are the target.
prompt_rules.description_example_template:
{opening}

{hikaye}

─────────────────────────────
PRODUCT DETAILS
─────────────────────────────
⬡ SKU: {urun_id}
⬡ Color Scheme: {renk_scheme}
⬡ Size: {boyut_ft} / {boyut_cm} cm
⬡ Total Area: {sqft} sq ft / {metrekare} sq m
⬡ Pattern: {pattern}
{pile_bullet}

─────────────────────────────
CONDITION & CARE
─────────────────────────────
Professionally cleaned before dispatch. No odors, no hidden wear. Regular light vacuuming and occasional spot cleaning is sufficient — no specialist maintenance required.

─────────────────────────────
SHIPPING
─────────────────────────────
Dispatched within 1 business day. Worldwide delivery in 2–4 business days. Packed securely to arrive in perfect condition. All customs duties and import taxes are covered by us — the price shown is the final price.

─────────────────────────────
RETURNS
─────────────────────────────
Not satisfied? Contact us within 14 days of delivery. We'll guide you through a simple, hassle-free return process.

─────────────────────────────
TRADE & WHOLESALE
─────────────────────────────
Interior designers and decorators are welcome to enquire about trade pricing and bulk sourcing.

Note: Each piece is unique. Photography is taken in natural daylight — colors may vary slightly depending on screen settings.

Store: bohorughouse.etsy.com
